/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_ir_build.dir/tests/cpu/test_ir_build.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ir_build.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o test_ir_build   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/8  liblunara.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvrtc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvrtc-builtins.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcuda.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
